<style>
/* ━━ 捕获组速查（共84组）━━
  $1-$15  基础字段（世界→物品）
  $16     系统消息
  $17-$23  主线任务拆分   $24-$30  支线任务拆分
  $31-$37  隐藏任务拆分   $38-$44  已完成拆分
  c1: $45名职 $46状 $47感 $48心声 $49装 $50处 $51行 $52略
  c2: $53-$60   c3: $61-$68   c4: $69-$76   c5: $77-$84
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ */
.rpsb{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',Georgia,serif;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#080d16 0%,#0b1422 60%,#080f1c 100%);border:1px solid rgba(90,130,200,.18);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;box-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.6);max-width:100%}
.rpsb *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}

/* MODE TOGGLE */
.rpsb-mode{position:absolute;opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.rpsb-mode-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;font-size:10px;color:#6586a5;background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);border:1px solid rgba(90,130,200,.14);border-radius:8px;padding:4px 8px;line-height:1;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.04);transition:background .2s,border-color .2s,color .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.rpsb-mode-btn:hover{background:rgba(122,176,224,.08);border-color:rgba(122,176,224,.24);color:#9fbed8}
.rpsb-mode-btn svg{width:12px;height:12px;stroke:currentColor;fill:none;stroke-width:1.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;flex-shrink:0}
.rpsb-mode-btn .rpsb-night{display:none}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-mode-btn .rpsb-day,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-mode-btn .rpsb-day{display:none}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-mode-btn .rpsb-night,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-mode-btn .rpsb-night{display:inline}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-mode-btn,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-mode-btn{color:#7a5028;background:rgba(0,0,0,.04);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.18)}

/* COLLAPSE TOGGLE */
.rpsb{display:block}
.rpsb-panel-state{position:absolute;opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.rpsb-panel{display:none}
.rpsb:has(.rpsb-open:checked) .rpsb-panel{display:block}
.rpsb-head-open,.rpsb-head-close,.rpsb-mode-btn,.rpsb-fold-btn{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;touch-action:manipulation}
.rpsb-fold-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#dfe5ec;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(90,130,200,.12);border-radius:8px;padding:4px 10px;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;transition:background .2s,border-color .2s,color .2s}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fold-btn,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fold-btn{color:#7a5028;background:rgba(0,0,0,.04);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.16)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fold-btn:hover,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fold-btn:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.24);color:#5e3c1c}
.rpsb-fold-btn:hover{background:rgba(122,176,224,.08);border-color:rgba(122,176,224,.22);color:#f0f4f8}
.rpsb-tg[data-task=""],.rpsb-crow[data-name=""]{display:none!important}
.rpsb:has(.rpsb-open:checked) .rpsb-head-close{display:block}
.rpsb:has(.rpsb-open:checked) .rpsb-ch{transform:rotate(180deg);stroke:#7ab4e0}/* DAY MODE — 羊皮纸配色 */
.rpsb.is-day,/* DAY MODE — 羊皮纸配色 */
.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked){display:block;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#ddd0b4 0%,#e8dcc4 55%,#d7c6a3 100%);color:#140e04}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-headbtn:hover,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-headbtn:hover{background:rgba(80,45,10,.035)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-headbtn::after,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-headbtn::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(138,94,32,.24),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ey,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ey,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ts,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ts,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-st,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-st,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-il,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-il,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-bn,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-bn{color:#a27a40}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ey::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ey::before,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-sl,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-sl{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(138,94,32,.28),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ti,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ti,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tv,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tv,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-iv,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-iv,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cn,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cn{color:#140e04}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-su,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-su,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fc,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-sm,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-sm,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-dt,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-dt{color:#5e3c1c}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-el,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-el,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cs,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cs{color:#7a5028;background:rgba(0,0,0,.04);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.16)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ch,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ch{stroke:#9a7238}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-sys,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-sys{background:rgba(138,94,32,.075);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.18);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(80,45,10,.08)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-card,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-card{background:rgba(255,250,240,.72);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.16);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(80,45,10,.08)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-sys::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-sys::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#8a6028,#b88038)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-sys::after,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-sys::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(180,130,60,.18),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-card::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-card::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(180,130,60,.18),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-foc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-foc{background:rgba(138,94,32,.075);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.18)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-foc::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-foc::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#8a6028,#b88038)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fl,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fl,.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-sn,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-sn{font-size:8.5px;font-weight:500;color:#9a7238;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fo,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fo{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#2a1b08;margin-bottom:5px;line-height:1.4;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ig,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ig{border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.12)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ic,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ic{background:rgba(245,232,210,.48);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.12)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-bt,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-bt{background:rgba(0,0,0,.08)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg{background:rgba(245,232,210,.42);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.13);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.35),0 4px 12px rgba(80,45,10,.07)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tc{background:rgba(255,250,240,.38);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.08)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-td,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-td{opacity:.78}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.main,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.main{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(138,94,32,.11),rgba(255,250,240,.45));border-color:rgba(138,94,32,.20)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.main::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.main::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#8a6028,#b88038)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.main .rpsb-tb,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.main .rpsb-tb{background:rgba(138,94,32,.10);color:#6f451c;border-color:rgba(138,94,32,.22)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.main .rpsb-tl,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.main .rpsb-tl{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(138,94,32,.24),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.main .rpsb-tc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.main .rpsb-tc{color:#5e3c1c;background:rgba(255,250,240,.45);border-color:rgba(138,94,32,.10)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.side::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.side::before{background:#7d7663}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.side .rpsb-tb,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.side .rpsb-tb{background:rgba(110,95,70,.08);color:#695b42;border-color:rgba(110,95,70,.15)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.side .rpsb-tl,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.side .rpsb-tl{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(110,95,70,.15),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.side .rpsb-tc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.side .rpsb-tc{color:#62583e}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.hidden::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.hidden::before{background:#756f78}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.hidden .rpsb-tb,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.hidden .rpsb-tb{background:rgba(100,88,105,.08);color:#665a6a;border-color:rgba(100,88,105,.14)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.hidden .rpsb-tl,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.hidden .rpsb-tl{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(100,88,105,.14),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.hidden .rpsb-tc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.hidden .rpsb-tc{color:#625763}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.done::before,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.done::before{background:#77766d}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.done .rpsb-tb,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.done .rpsb-tb{background:rgba(95,90,75,.07);color:#77705f;border-color:rgba(95,90,75,.13)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.done .rpsb-tl,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.done .rpsb-tl{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(95,90,75,.13),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-tg.done .rpsb-tc,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-tg.done .rpsb-tc{color:#7b735f;text-decoration-color:rgba(95,90,75,.35)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-crow,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-crow{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,250,240,.54),rgba(245,232,210,.36));border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.14);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.38),0 4px 12px rgba(80,45,10,.06)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-crow[open],.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-crow[open]{border-color:rgba(138,94,32,.22);background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,250,240,.68),rgba(240,224,195,.48))}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-crow>summary:hover,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-crow>summary:hover{background:rgba(138,94,32,.04);box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 rgba(138,94,32,.36)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ct,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ct{color:#8a6030}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ca .rpsb-cal,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ca .rpsb-cal{color:#7a5028}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cbar,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cbar{background:rgba(0,0,0,.08);border-color:rgba(138,94,32,.16)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cfill,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cfill{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8a6028,#b88038);box-shadow:none}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cnum,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cnum{color:#7a5028}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-arr,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-arr{background:rgba(0,0,0,.035);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.14);color:#9a7238}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cinn,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cinn{background:rgba(80,45,10,.035);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.10)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cf,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cf{background:rgba(255,250,240,.36);border-color:rgba(150,110,60,.09);color:#5e3c1c}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cfi,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cfi{stroke:#9a7238}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ck,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ck{font-size:10px;color:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:.04em;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-cv,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-cv{color:#5e3c1c}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-foot,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-foot{opacity:.38}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fline,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fline{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(138,94,32,.25))}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fline.r,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fline.r{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(138,94,32,.25),transparent)}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-fgem,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-fgem{background:#9a7238}.rpsb.is-day .rpsb-ftxt,.rpsb:has(.rpsb-mode:checked) .rpsb-ftxt{color:#9a7238}

.rpsb::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:8%;right:8%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(140,190,255,.14),transparent);z-index:1;pointer-events:none}

/* HEADER */
.rpsb-headbtn{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;padding:18px 20px 16px;position:relative;transition:background .2s}
.rpsb-head-left{position:relative;flex:1;min-width:0}
.rpsb-head-open{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;width:100%;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;position:relative;min-width:0}
.rpsb-head-close{display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;cursor:pointer;z-index:2;background:transparent;border:0}
.rpsb-headbtn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.025)}
.rpsb-headbtn::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:5%;right:5%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(90,130,200,.22),transparent)}
.rpsb-ey{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.24em;color:#f5f8ff;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}
.rpsb-ey::before{content:'';width:20px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.45),transparent)}
.rpsb-ti{font-size:22px;font-weight:500;color:#ddeaff;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:4px}
.rpsb-de{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:5px}
.rpsb-de-g{width:5px;height:5px;background:#c0923a;opacity:.6;clip-path:polygon(50% 0,100% 50%,50% 100%,0 50%);flex-shrink:0}
.rpsb-de-d{width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%;background:#c0923a;opacity:.35;flex-shrink:0}
.rpsb-de-l{width:55px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.22),transparent)}
.rpsb-su{font-size:11px;color:#4a6274;font-weight:300;line-height:1.55;max-width:190px}
.rpsb-hr{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px;flex-shrink:0;padding-left:10px}
.rpsb-tv{font-size:19px;font-weight:400;color:#ddeaff;letter-spacing:.07em;line-height:1}
.rpsb-ts{font-size:10px;color:#f5f8ff;text-align:right;margin-top:2px}
.rpsb-el{font-size:10px;color:#48607a;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(90,130,200,.11);border-radius:20px;padding:3px 9px}
.rpsb-ch{width:16px;height:16px;stroke:#2a3c54;fill:none;stroke-width:1.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;transition:transform .36s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),stroke .2s;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px}
.rpsb>details[open]>summary .rpsb-ch{transform:rotate(180deg);stroke:#7ab4e0}

/* BODY */
.rpsb-body{padding:10px 14px 16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}

/* SYSTEM */
.rpsb-sys{background:rgba(68,108,188,.07);border:1px solid rgba(100,150,230,.18);border-radius:14px;padding:13px 16px 13px 20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.rpsb-sys::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#6090c8,#c0923a)}
.rpsb-sys::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:12%;right:12%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(140,190,255,.11),transparent);pointer-events:none}
.rpsb-si{display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:14px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.rpsb-av{width:96px;min-height:104px;align-self:stretch;flex-shrink:0}
.rpsb-avr{position:absolute;opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.rpsb-avl{display:none;width:100%;height:100%;min-height:104px;cursor:pointer;touch-action:manipulation;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a0:checked) .rpsb-al0,.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a1:checked) .rpsb-al1,.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a2:checked) .rpsb-al2,.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a3:checked) .rpsb-al3,.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a4:checked) .rpsb-al4,.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a5:checked) .rpsb-al5,.rpsb-av:has(.rpsb-a6:checked) .rpsb-al6{display:block}
.rpsb-avi{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:104px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(100,150,230,.18);object-fit:cover;display:block;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05),0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
.rpsb-avi:hover{border-color:rgba(192,146,58,.5);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(192,146,58,.2)}
.rpsb-sc{flex:1;min-width:0;padding:2px 0 1px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.rpsb-sh{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:7px}
.rpsb-sn{font-size:8.5px;font-weight:500;color:#ffffff;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.45)}
.rpsb-sd{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#48ba86;box-shadow:0 0 6px #48ba86;animation:rp-blink 2.4s infinite;flex-shrink:0}
@keyframes rp-blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.rpsb-sm{font-size:12px;color:#648aaa;line-height:1.65;font-weight:300;white-space:pre-wrap;word-wrap:break-word}

/* FOCUS */
.rpsb-foc{background:rgba(68,108,188,.07);border:1px solid rgba(100,150,230,.18);border-radius:14px;padding:13px 16px 13px 20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.rpsb-foc::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#6090c8,#c0923a)}
